lede: A clear, repeatable engagement — from the first audit to an ongoing partnership. The same team stays with you end to end.

steps.name: Assess
steps.desc: We audit your current architecture, costs and goals to map the highest-impact moves.

steps.name: Architect
steps.desc: We design a secure, cloud-native architecture tailored to your stack and compliance needs.

steps.name: Migrate
steps.desc: We execute phased, zero-downtime migration with rollback safety at every step.

steps.name: Optimize
steps.desc: We tune cost, performance and reliability — auto-scaling, caching and FinOps.

steps.name: Support
steps.desc: We stay on as your partner: monitoring, iteration and regular roadmap reviews.
